raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"puzzle_constraints","confidence":0.97,"matched_text":"The farmer needs to transport a fox, a chicken, and some grain across a river using a boat.","distilled_fact":"A farmer needs to transport a fox, a chicken, and some grain across a river using a boat."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"puzzle_constraints","confidence":0.98,"matched_text":"The fox cannot be left alone with the chicken, and the chicken cannot be left alone with the grain.","distilled_fact":"The fox cannot be left alone with the chicken, and the chicken cannot be left alone with the grain."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"puzzle_constraints","confidence":0.96,"matched_text":"The boat can only hold one item at a time, and the river is too dangerous to cross multiple times.","distilled_fact":"The boat can only hold one item at a time, and the river is too dangerous to cross multiple times."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"puzzle_safety_warning","confidence":0.94,"matched_text":"Be careful not to leave the chicken alone with the fox, or the chicken and the grain alone together, as this will result in a failed solution.","distilled_fact":"Leaving the chicken alone with the fox or leaving the chicken and the grain alone together will result in a failed solution."}]}
